tracks.rawText: 1:40No te comparesv5.5Rap-rock / rap-metal with crunchy drop-tuned palm-muted guitars, chugging riff motifs, and live drumkit snaps: tight kick, snare rimshot, cymbal choke accents, Spanish rap flows ride an anthemic bassline, turntable scratches, overdriven chorus layers, and a gritty, streetwise texture that escalates through denser phrasing and harsher timbres1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:36$$$$ [2330592518]UploadSpanish trap and reggaeton fusion at 100 BPM in the key of G minor, The track features a dark, minimalist production style centered around a heavy 808 bassline that provides melodic movement, A repetitive, high-pitched bell-like synth melody creates a tense atmosphere, The percussion consists of a standard reggaeton dembow rhythm with crisp snares, sharp hi-hat rolls, and a punchy kick drum, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, aggressive rap style with occasional melodic inflections and heavy use of autotune, The arrangement includes sudden beat cuts and filtered transitions to emphasize lyrical delivery, A subtle, atmospheric pad provides harmonic depth in the background during the melodic bridges5PublishRemix

0:11[Rec] Jun 18 13:48:49UploadReggaeton with a mid-tempo dembow rhythm at 90 BPM in the key of G minor, A clean, plucked nylon-string acoustic guitar plays a syncopated, arpeggiated riff that repeats throughout, The percussion features a standard dembow kick and snare pattern with a crisp, dry snare sound, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick drum pattern, Male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and a slight plate reverb, delivered in a melodic, rhythmic flow characteristic of urban Latin pop1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Jun 18 13:48:49

tracks.rawText: 2:34Z0nAnD0 [2340162938]UploadBoom bap hip hop with a heavy emphasis on record scratching and sampling, The track features a prominent boom bap drum pattern with a crisp snare and a deep, punchy kick, A repetitive, high-pitched synth melody or sample loop provides the melodic hook, The bassline is a simple, sub-heavy groove that follows the kick drum, Frequent record scratches and vocal chops are used as rhythmic and transitional elements, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of G minor, The arrangement includes a male rapper delivering rhythmic, Spanish-language verses with a confident, street-oriented flow, Production techniques include vinyl crackle, heavy compression on the drums, and filtered transitions1PublishRemix
